mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0%, labor market deterioration signals imminent corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in greater than 65% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal income and housing starts indicate a synchronized collapse in consumer demand and construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint declines in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict negative 60-day returns with a rank IC below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during periods of stable inflation reflects robust manufacturing capacity utilization, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases yield negative 20-day returns when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3.0% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly boost aggregate consumer spending expectations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 5-day forward returns across all market conditions.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation accelerates beyond 3.5%, anticipated central bank tightening compresses equity multiples, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in greater than 70% of months where CPIAUCSL growth surpasses 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and real personal income confirms broad-based economic strength, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined GDPC1 and RSAFS growth fails to generate positive 20-day returns with statistical significance at p less than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Falling industrial production during post-recession recovery phases indicates weak aggregate demand that suppresses corporate earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines in recovery phases predict positive 5-day returns in greater than 60% of observed cases.
